title: rubus laxatus
intro: Rubus laxatus, also known as the lax leaf raspberry, is a type of bramble plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve constipation due to its laxative properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating fever, and supporting the immune system. Rubus laxatus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies to enhance its effects.
